Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,714,821 (46.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,213 opening theaters/2,213 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,184,560

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 11th, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: May 6th, 2008 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language, some sexual humor, and brief drug references.
Running Time: 96 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: African Americans, Confidence Men, Heist, Money Troubles, Redemption, Relationships Gone Wrong, Religious, Romance
Subgenre: Crime Comedy

Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
